titleStmt.title: SII 22.65: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 65. (A.R. No. 65 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUMAYĀNAM BRAHMAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME PRĀKĀRA KULŌTTUṄGA III—13th YEAR (A.D. 1190-91)

summary.p: The king is mentioned with his usual attributes. This records the appointment of one Naṟputtuḍaiyāṉ••• Guṇachcharaṉ in place of a certain Chaṇḍēśurappichchaṉ (deceased) as nandavaṉakkuḍi to look after the flower garden which had been endowed to the temple by a devotee by name Vāchchiyaṉ Jātavēdaṉ alias Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ of Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu on the northern bank of the river (Kāvērī).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
karavattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3vatu patiṉmu
ṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ākkūr nāṭṭu tirukkaṭavūr Uṭaiyār tirumayāṉamuṭaiya perumāḷukku vaṭakarai ci rājādhirājavaḷanāṭṭut taṉiyūr
yūr vājyaṉ jātavetaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ In nāyaṉārkku tiruttoṇṭu ceykiṟa rājādhirājaṉ tirunantavaṉattu kuṭikaḷukku nāṉ kal veṭṭi Ivar
kaḷukkuk kāṇiyākak kuṭuttu Ivarkaḷuñ ceytu vārāniṟka Ittirunantavaṉakkuṭi caṇṭecurappiccaṉ cettup pāytta
ceyvārillāmaiyāl naṟputtuṭaiyāṉāṉa kuṇaccaraṉai Innilai Il nāṭṭi Ivaṉukkuk kalveṭṭiṉapaṭi yivaṉu
kkum Ivan vaṟkattāṟkum commāvutāka yivaṉai yeṉ Ikkoyi lilk kumpiṭṭirukkum vācciyaṉ jātavetaṉāṉa ciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉeṉ
Digital edition of SII 22.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
